pt_classify.name: classify
pt_classify.description: Classify a free-form item description into a bin colour. Returns {"bin_color": "<colour>"} for items that fit a kerbside bin (e.g. "Yellow", "Red", "Lime Green"), or {"bin_color": null} for items that don't (e.g. tree branches in a system without a green-waste bin). Call this once per component.

item.description: Free-form description of the item being classified, e.g. 'cereal box', 'soft plastic liner', 'banana peel'.

pt_show_bin.name: show_bin
pt_show_bin.description: Display a coloured bin tile to the user. Call this after classify, in the response where you tell the user which bin to use.

color.description: The bin colour to display, e.g. 'Yellow', 'Red', 'Lime Green'.

pt_reward_points.name: reward_points
pt_reward_points.description: Award the user points for a correctly classified component. Returns {"points": <new_total>}. Call exactly once per show_bin call — never twice for the same component.

points.description: Points to award. Use 5 for a single correct classification.
